n: Chapter 15.9: A Wizard In His Natural Environment

steps.t: Inkanûsh is in the Kalmakhíla in north-west Zajâna, beside the commons.
Inkanûsh has selected a tome and some pages for you to study in the Kalmakhíla.
Inkanûsh has selected a tome and some pages for you to study in the Kalmakhíla.
Inkanûsh is in the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Mashkânu of Têrkar's Travellers has come to the Kalmakhíla, his weapon raised in anger.
If you are able to <rgb=#00FF00>calm</rgb> Mashkânu, you might avoid the violence he intends in the Kalmakhíla.
Mashkânu's rage has been replaced with sorrow.
Mashkânu's rage has been replaced with sorrow.
Glorfindel is at the Overgate north of Zajâna.
Glorfindel is at the Overgate outside Zajâna.
Ulishár is at the Overgate outside Zajâna.
